name: Mexican-Style Chicken Kiev
recipeIngredient: 8 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
4 ounces Monterey Jack cheese, cut into 8 strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound chicken pieces to about 1/4-inch thickness.
2. Place about 2 tablespoons of diced green chiles and 1 Jack cheese strip in the center of each chicken piece.
3. Roll up each chicken piece, tucking the ends under securely.
4. Combine bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, chili powder, salt, ground cumin, and black pepper in a shallow dish.
5. Dip each stuffed chicken piece into melted butter, then roll in the crumb mixture.
6. Place the chicken rolls, seam side down, in an oblong baking dish and drizzle with a little melted butter.
7. Cover and chill for 4 hours or overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 400°F and bake uncovered for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
9. To make sauce, combine tomato sauce, ground cumin, and green onions in a small saucepan. Add salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce; heat well. Serve chicken with the sauce.
